# Getting help with Bowire

Thanks for using Bowire! Here's the fastest way to get what you need.

| I want to… | Go to |
| --- | --- |
| **Ask a how-to / usage question** | [Discussions → Q&A](https://github.com/Kuestenlogik/Bowire/discussions/categories/q-a) — searchable, and answers help the next person. |
| **Suggest a feature or share an idea** | [Discussions → Ideas](https://github.com/Kuestenlogik/Bowire/discussions/categories/ideas) — propose it and let others upvote before it becomes a tracked issue. |
| **Report a bug** | [Open an issue](https://github.com/Kuestenlogik/Bowire/issues/new/choose) with the Bug report template. |
| **Show what you built** | [Discussions → Show and tell](https://github.com/Kuestenlogik/Bowire/discussions/categories/show-and-tell). |
| **Follow releases & news** | [Discussions → Announcements](https://github.com/Kuestenlogik/Bowire/discussions/categories/announcements) and [Releases](https://github.com/Kuestenlogik/Bowire/releases). |
| **Read the docs** | [`docs/`](https://github.com/Kuestenlogik/Bowire/tree/main/docs). |

**Issues vs. Discussions:** GitHub issues track confirmed bugs and planned work. Questions, ideas, and open-ended conversation live in [Discussions](https://github.com/Kuestenlogik/Bowire/discussions) — that keeps the issue tracker focused and makes answers findable for everyone.

Please also read our [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) and [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
